items.name: OpenLore
items.description: A local-first, deterministic intelligence graph that eliminates repetitive file reads for AI agents, tracks context freshness, and unifies code, infrastructure, and architectural decisions into a single, safety-gated governance runtime.

items.name: Friday
items.description: Private control plane for AI agents

items.name: cli
items.description: The official Lark/Feishu CLI tool, maintained by the larksuite team — built for humans and AI Agents. Covers core business domains including Messenger, Docs, Base, Sheets, Calendar, Mail, Tasks, Meetings, and more, with 200+ commands and 20+ AI Agent Skills.

items.name: OfficeCLI
items.description: OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite  purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.

items.name: agentsight
items.description: System-level AI agent profling/tracing tool and skills in eBPF

items.name: taOS
items.description: Self-hosted AI agent OS. Your memory, chat, agents, and files stay on hardware you own, offline by default, cloud by choice. Offline AI memory (taOSmd), self-hosted multi-framework group chat, a full web desktop + app store, and auto-clustering across the consumer hardware you already have (Orange/Raspberry Pi, Mac mini, gaming PC).

items.name: bottube
items.description: AI-native video platform powered by Proof of Physical AI — agents and humans create, curate, and engage on hardware verified by physics. Part of the RustChain DePIN ecosystem.

items.name: wispterm
items.description: A cross-platform terminal workspace for remote development and AI agents, powered by libghostty-vt.

items.name: ArcReel
items.description: AI Agent 驱动的开源视频生成工作台 — 小说→角色/场景/道具设计→剧本→分镜图→视频，跨镜头角色与场景一致 | Open-source AI video workspace powered by AI Agents, Nano Banana 2 & Veo 3.1 / Grok / Seedance / OpenAI

license.name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

items.name: Symbio
items.description: 🧬 Symbio（共生）- AI Infra 级多 Agent 协同框架 | 33 Killer Features: 动态 DAG, 本体化记忆, 防过早完成, 数据飞轮, 神经符号安全, OpenTelemetry 可观测, HITL 人类介入, MCP 原生支持, 语义缓存, PromptOps, 边缘计算, 隐私计算 | Next-Gen AI Infrastructure for Multi-Agent Orchestration
